title: Show-off Spanish Almond Stir-fry
description: A silky and sour show-off dish featuring almond extract, cooked sous-vide for added depth of flavor, suitable for gluten-free diets.
instructions: Mix together soy sauce, almond extract, and minced garlic in a bowl.
Place the gluten-free breadcrumbs into another bowl. Add the soy sauce mixture and mix until evenly coated with sauce.
Add chopped red bell pepper to the breadcrumb mixture and gently toss to combine.
Carefully pour the breadcrumb mixture into a sous-vide bag lined with parchment paper, seal it well, and cook for 1 hour at 160°F (71°C).
Once cooked, remove from water bath and place on a cutting board. Let sit for about 15 minutes.
Mix in sour cream until fully incorporated.
Serve hot with additional gluten-free bread crumbs on top as garnish.
